## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX teams to discuss content marketing performance, upcoming product features, and collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong CTR improvement (2.5%+) in recent months, signaling increased content relevance to Google](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Superhuman planning "Summer of AI" campaign, including new vacation responder feature and webinar with AI-native tools](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Significant calendar functionality improvements coming, with potential for expanded content production in Q3](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Need to explore connecting content performance metrics to acquisition/MQL data for better ROI tracking](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [CTR improved from 2.13% to 2.56% in last 3 months vs. previous 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Impressions decreased (113K to 102K) but higher CTR indicates more relevant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [First page results and SERP features (e.g., AI snippets, FAQs) showing positive growth](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Multiple articles getting good traffic, especially AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### Image Generation for Content

  - [Tested AI-generated infographics for stat-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Current output needs refinement (alignment, centering issues)](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Alex provided access to existing Superhuman-designed social graphics for reference](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Team to explore recreating designs closer to Superhuman's style using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Upcoming Superhuman Features & Campaigns

  - ["Summer of AI" campaign launching in June](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [New vacation responder feature using calendar data to auto-detect OOO periods](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Significant calendar functionality improvements planned for July timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Potential calendar-focused product launch and landing page in Q3](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Recent AI email webinar generated high interest in calendar features](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

### Content Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Explore creating articles based on webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Consider expanding Q3 content to include calendar productivity topics](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Team to provide positioning and high-level info to guide calendar-related content](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to explore connecting content performance data to acquisition/MQL metrics](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [GrowthX team to experiment with AI image generation closer to Superhuman's style](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Morgan to share link to recent webinar blog post when published](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Discuss shifting meeting time 30-60 minutes earlier to accommodate East Coast schedules](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Alex to coordinate with Elvis on rescheduling for two weeks from now](https://fathom.video/share/2BDoTm7vD-cjRWmLGmuKw4C73xashYHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
